ingest_command: for chr in chr{1..22} chrX chrY; do bcftools view -f PASS gnomad.genomes.v4.1.sites.${chr}.vcf.bgz | bcftools annotate -x '^INFO/AF,INFO/AF_popmax' ; done | llmap variant-ingest --source gnomad_genome_snv --bucket-bp 100 --output gnomad_snv.priors
notes: Highest-quality SNV AF catalog for human; preferred over dbSNP for AF estimates.
